title: fishy weapons
body:
🎣 FishFight: Aquatic Arsenal Resource Pack
Why wield boring old weapons when you can slap your enemies with seafood?

This lighthearted resource pack replaces traditional combat gear with fishy alternatives:

- Crossbows become mighty Cod launchers 🐟
- Bows turn into swift-firing Salmon 🐠
- The fearsome Mace? Now it's a deadly Pufferfish 🐡

Perfect for underwater-themed worlds or anyone who thinks combat needs more fins and scales. No gameplay changes — just a splash of silliness and a whole lot of fishy fun.

This package does not require CIT Resewn or Optifine in 1.21.5 and above.
